qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo , PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_ingreso FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP , PER01_PERSONAL , TTA04_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER TTA04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp = {#SOURCE:@id} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = \'1\' ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo , PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_ingreso FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP , PER01_PERSONAL , TTA04_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER TTA04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#SOURCE:@CODE} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = \'1\' ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo , PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.f_ingreso FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP , PER01_PERSONAL , TTA04_PERSONAL JOIN PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp INNER TTA04_PERSONAL.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_empresa = {#SOURCE:@oi_empresa} AND PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_indic_activo = \'1\' ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW
